name: Sichuan Guoguang Agrochemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Sichuan Guoguang Agrochemical Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, marketing, and distribution of agrochemical products and materials in China. Its products include plant growth regulators, fertilizers, fungicides, insecticides, bio-pesticide, and herbicides. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Chengdu, China.
